A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Don Bosco Institute of Technology and Science for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Don Bosco Institute of Technology and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

A:    Don Bosco Institute of Technology and Science offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 5 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ambal Professional Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Ambal Professional Group of Institutions fee structure ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Ambal Professional Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category).
The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible.
Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible.
Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

review_summary.college_name: Audisankara College of Engineering for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good curriculum and facilities are there.

content.Placements: Placements at Audisankara College are awesome. Audisankara is a college of opportunities; around 150+ companies visited the campus of the Audisankara College of Engineering for Women for recruitment, and 400+ jobs are offered to Audisankara students. The average package of our branch is around INR 24 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the necessary facilities, like hostels, a sports complex, a mess, and canteens. There are three boy's hostels and one girl's hostel equipped with facilities like 24*7 Wi-Fi connectivity, washing machines on each floor, and separate mess rooms for each hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with our college placements.

content.Placements: Placements are moderate. Placements are conducted firstly for SANK students and then will be conducted for ASIT students. If there are any seats left, then they will be for our college students. Almost 25% of students got placed in this course. Almost 85% of students got placed in our batch.
content.Infrastructure: We have a separate building. It is a little bit far away from the ASIT block. We have to utilise ASIT laboratories. Sometimes, we use ASIT classrooms. Our college provides Wi-Fi. It provides 1 GB of free data. We have a canteen in this college. It provides hygienic food. Our college has a huge space for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Learning for good knowledge.

content.Placements: In our college, they are providing placements for my seniors. Many members are placed in many companies, my college provides placements for the students with above 60 percent aggregate without backlogs. For our batch, they are providing placements. The packages offered ranges from 1.5 to 2.5l pa.
content.Infrastructure: In my batch, there was no Wi-Fi facility, but now, they provide Wi-Fi also. The classroom teaching is good, and the library is also good. Many books are available. There are no medical facilities but care for students. They are providing sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of Audisankara College of Engineering for Women.

content.Placements: Every year, the number of students getting placed is increasing. This shows how the management is concerned and responsible for the students getting placed. Practicality in the education makes student interested in the subject and get the deep knowledge over the subject this helps in cracking the interviews easily. There is at least a 20% increase in the number of students placed. The average package would be around 2.2 PA and the highest would be 3.4 PA.
content.Infrastructure: It has a very good infrastructure. 24 hrs Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms and well-equipped labs are available. At any time, minimal first aid can be given which helps the patient before the hospital. In the library, you can spend hours reading great volumes of great authors. Any issues faced can be resolved in a day or two as soon as the respective authorities take notice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Its good n better college to do engineering in EC.

content.Placements: 50 percent student placed in our course the highest 10 l. n the lowest 2l Infosys. Hcl Blanco more than 60 percent they will get internships. Top management roles were offered to the students who studies in the audisankara engineering college. Very good. College.
content.Infrastructure: It has Wi-Fi n labs n good classroom n best teaching staff. It provides the student mental n physical happiness. The facilities available for the students in the campus are mess canteen medical facilities sports n game. Best coaching staff bus facility.

reviews.review_heading: This college will give you nothing but a lot of arrears.
reviews.review_text: There is a beautiful playground, but you should not play there. Labs are well-constructed with cracks, but you can't expect all the equipment. There is no Wi-Fi facility provided for students and even for the principal. There is not even a first-aid box provided. Even if you fall down and injure yourself, you should not expect any first aid from the management. There are no proper benches. There is a big canteen, but no food is provided there. There are worms and lizards found in the gravy often...

reviews.review_heading: One can develop their skills with this developing college.
reviews.review_text: My college has non-completed building and heat environment. You can't see any trees in this college. There is no entrance. It is in Dindugal-Trichy highway, so always hot air and its pollution surround this college. There is no proper canteen facility in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Facts of Shivani college and very dissatisfied.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Krishna Engineering College.

content.Placements: Our college has approachable, knowledgeable, and friendly teachers. We have built our reputation as a leading engineering college in Bhilai based on the success of our long-term teaching efforts ensuring 100% placement. 95-99% of students got placed and the lowest salary package offered for this course is 3.5 LPA, the average salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 10LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, etc. About 80% of students got internships from this course and also get pre-placement offers. Roles offered are software developer, web developer, and mostly full stack developer of this course. Standard of excellence and strategic tie-ups with the best companies for the students of Krishna Engineering College ranked the best out of other colleges in Bhilai.

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of its placements.
